green.command: packages/agent: bun run test src/__tests__/upload-signer.test.ts; bun run test; bun run lint; bun run typecheck. packages/shared: bun run test -- src/__tests__/modules/ipfs.module.test.ts; bun run test -- src/__tests__/modules/wallet-submission.test.ts. root: VITE_PINATA_JWT=stale-token node scripts/dev/doctor.js --profile upload --json; node scripts/harness/plan-hub.mjs validate.
green.evidence: Agent signer route/config/rate-limit validation passed: upload-signer.test.ts 5 tests, full agent suite 100 tests, lint 0 warnings/errors, typecheck passed. Shared signed upload regression tests passed after sandbox DNS blocked Bun managed Node resolution and the approved rerun completed: ipfs.module.test.ts 11 tests, wallet-submission.test.ts 10 tests. Doctor intentionally exited 1 and emitted env:pinata-browser-secret for stale VITE_PINATA_JWT while confirming VITE_API_BASE_URL. Plan hub validated 19 feature hubs.

tdd.note: Implementation predates the 2026-05-01 TDD proof policy, so no honest RED can be produced without inventing history. AC-1 through AC-5 were reverified from source, tests, docs, fallback validation, and a follow-up live signer-route upload proof; no behavior gap was found.
No contract implementation lane is planned for the upload signer work.
